headline: Is It Too Late To Consider PNC Financial (PNC) After Its 107% Three Year Run?
summary: Wondering if PNC Financial Services Group at around US$219 per share is still offering value, or if the easy money has already been made. The stock has returned 3.0% over the past week, is roughly flat over the last month with a 0.3% decline, and sits on a 3.7% year to date gain alongside a 31.9% return over the past year and 107.1% over three years. These returns arrive as investors react to broad sector themes in US banking and credit, including ongoing attention on balance sheet...
